provisions.offense:
Mischief by destroying or moving or
rendering less useful a lighthouse or
seamark, or by exhibiting false lights
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 7 years, or
fine, or both.

provisions.offense:
Mischief by destroying or moving,

provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 1 year, or
fine, or both.

provisions.offense:
Mischief by fire or explosive
substance with intent to cause damage

upwards, or, in case of agricultural
produce, 10 rupees or upwards.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 7 years and
fine.

provisions.offense:
Mischief by fire or explosive
substance with intent to destroy a
house, etc.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for life, or
imprisonment for 10 years and
fine.

provisions.offense:
Mischief with intent to destroy or
make unsafe a decked vessel or a
vessel of 20 tonnes burden.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 10 years and
fine.

provisions.offense:
The mischief described in the last
section when committed by fire or
any explosive substance.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for life, or
imprisonment for 10 years and
fine.

provisions.offense:
Running vessel ashore with intent to
commit theft, etc.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 10 years and
fine.

provisions.offense: Criminal trespass
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 3 months, or

Imprisonment for 1 year, or fine

provisions.offense: Lurking house-trespass or housebreaking.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 2 years

provisions.offense: Lurking house-trespass or house-breaking by night.

Imprisonment for 3 years
and fine.

Lurking house-trespass or housebreaking in order to the commission

provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 3 years and
fine. But Imprisonment for 10 years
and fine if the offence be theft
provisions.court:
Any
Magistrate but Magistrate of
the first class if the offence be theft

provisions.offense:
Lurking house-trespass or housebreaking by night in order to the
commission of an offence punishable
with imprisonment.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 5 years and
fine.  But Imprisonment for 14 years
and fine if also theft
provisions.court:
Any
Magistrate but Magistrate of
the first class if the offence be theft

provisions.offense:
Lurking house-trespass or housebreaking after preparation made for

provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 10 years and
fine.

Lurking house-trespass or housebreaking by night, after preparation
made for causing hurt, etc.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 14 years and
fine.

Grievous hurt caused whilst
committing lurking house-trespass or
house-breaking.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 10 years and
fine.

provisions.offense:
Death or grievous hurt caused by one

provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 10 years and
fine.

provisions.offense:
House-trespass in order to the
commission of an offence punishable
with death.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for life, or
rigorous imprisonment for

provisions.offense:
House-trespass in order to the
commission of an offence punishable

provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 10 years and
fine.

provisions.offense:
House-trespass in order to the
commission of an offence punishable
with imprisonment.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 2 years
and fine. But imprisonment for 7 years
and fine if theft also committed.

provisions.offense:
House-trespass, having made
preparation for causing hurt, assault,
etc.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 7 years
and fine.

provisions.offense:
Dishonestly breaking open or
unfastening any closed receptacle
containing or supposed to contain
property.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 2 years or
fine, or both.

Being entrusted with any closed
receptacle containing or supposed to
contain any property, and fraudulently
opening the same.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 3 years or
fine, or both

provisions.offense: Forgery
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 2 years, or
fine, or both.

provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 7 years and
fine.

provisions.offense:
Forgery for the purpose of harming
the reputation of any person or
knowing that it is likely to be used for
that purpose.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 3 years and
fine.

Forgery of a record of a Court of

provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 7 years and
fine

Forgery of a valuable security, will, or

money, etc
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for life, or
imprisonment for 10 years and
fine

Non-cognizable, but Cognizable if the valuable security is a promissory note of the central
government

Imprisonment for 7 years and

Using as genuine a forged document

Imprisonment for 7 years and
fine

counterfeit.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for life, or
imprisonment for 7 years and
fine

Making or counterfeiting a seal, plate,
etc., with intent to commit a forgery
punishable otherwise than under
section 338 of the Bhartiya Nyaya
Sanhita, or possessing with like intent
any such seal, plate, etc., knowing the
same to be counterfeit.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 7 years and
fine

Possession of any seal, plate or other instrument knowing the same to be
counterfeit
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 3 years and
fine

provisions.offense:
Fraudulently or dishonestly using as genuine any seal, plate or other
instrument knowing or having reason to believe the same to be counterfeit
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 7 years and
fine

provisions.offense:
Counterfeiting a device or mark used
for authenticating documents
described in section 338 of the
Bhartiya Nyaya Sanhita, or possessing

Imprisonment for life, or
imprisonment for 7 years and
fine.

Counterfeiting a device or mark used
for authenticating documents other
than those described in section 338 of
the Bhartiya Nyaya Sanhita, or

material.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 7 years and
fine.

provisions.offense:
Fraudulently destroying or defacing,

secreting, a will, etc.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for life, or
imprisonment for 7 years and
fine.

provisions.offense: Falsification of accounts.

Imprisonment for 7 years or
fine, or both.

provisions.offense:
Using a false property mark with intent

Imprisonment for 1 year, or
fine, or both.

provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 1 year, or
fine, or both.

provisions.offense:
Counterfeiting a property mark used by

injury.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 2 years, or
fine, or both.

provisions.offense:
Counterfeiting a property mark used by

provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 3 years, or

Imprisonment for 3 years or,

Imprisonment for 1 year, or

fine, or both.

provisions.offense:
If threat be to cause death or grievous
hurt, etc.
provisions.punishment:
Imprisonment for 7 years, or
fine, or both.

Criminal intimidation by anonymous

Imprisonment for 2 years, or
fine, or both.

False statement, rumour, etc.,

Imprisonment for 3 years, or

False statement, rumour, etc., with

Imprisonment for 3 years, or

Prosecutor.

it to be defamatory, in any other case.
